judge.reason: Primary purpose is to clean up all skbs in the RX pipe, involving iteration, DMA unmapping, and freeing each skb. The refcount release via dev_kfree_skb_any is just one part of a broader cleanup routine, not the focused purpose. The function does not pass any reference-counted object to the caller.
